{{Quote|This is Base Commander Beckman: Help cover the evacuation ships!|Commander Beckman to Ace Azzameen during the Battle of Hospital|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>}}
'''Beckman''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] officer who served as a [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], he was in command of the [[Hospital (XQ2 Platform)|Rebel Hospital]] and its attending ships. The Hospital was attacked by the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] during a [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] shipment being carried out by the [[Azzameen family]]. After the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], Beckman led the base's [[Battle of Hospital|evacuation]] until he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] as the Imperial seized the hospital. Before his [[Death/Legends|death]], he pleaded the Azzameens to defend the transports that were carrying wounded Rebel personnel who had been injured during the firefight.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}} {{Voice}}
